title: All Together Now
description: This pack is a combination of the first five projects from the NightML Studios organization.
body:
# NightML's All Together Now

I absolutely love making things easier for users. So, simply speaking, that is what this is for.

This data pack - resource pack combination (also available as a mod for Forge, Neoforge, Fabric and Quilt) is for the purpose of making it easier for fans of NightML Studios' content to download the most recent version of all the different projects at once. In summary, this is an option for those who want to download all of the content from the **first five** projects made by NightML Studios. The only downsides is that it is a bit bigger, and it has everything in it. Luckily, being under an MIT license, once you have a copy, you can change this, by editing out unwanted portions - though it may be easier just to look at each individual pack if you are more decisive.

The specific content that this adds include; birch related block/items having a yellowish coloration, a beacon retexture that has a piece of bacon (a porkchop) on it, an event where every 20 seconds you get either a severly positive or severly negative effect, 3D Ladders and Vines with an according retexture, and as of the newest update **46** new crafting recipes that have a vanilla feel.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for packs via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Updates Fairly Often

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!

Also, starting now; if you subscribe to my YouTube channel, you will get a shout out on Modrinth!
